title: Cut & Fill Earthwork
description: Earthwork volume & mass along the corridor (RHS + LHS, 60 m RoW), shown as separate LHS / RHS fill-height lines and TCS type ranges.

summary.right_of_way: 60 m total (30 m LHS + 30 m RHS from centerline)
